platformSubtitle: Learn systems engineering by turning ambiguity into evidence-backed decisions before defects become rework, delay, safety exposure, or lost trust.

episodes.title: Coffee Service Systems Lab
episodes.subtitle: A guided lab notebook for learning systems engineering through one familiar office service.
episodes.overview: Build one coffee-service artifact thread at a time: boundary, needs, requirements, architecture, interface control, RAMS, implementation, integration, proof, operations feedback, retirement, and final evidence pack.
episodes.bestFor: Start here if SE terms, lifecycle processes, or V&V are new.
outcomes: Explain the ISO/IEC/IEEE 15288 technical processes as one connected lifecycle evidence thread.
Trace one stakeholder need through requirements, architecture, interface control, RAMS, design, proof, operation, retirement, and gate evidence.
Separate verification, validation, transition, and assurance evidence using the same coffee-service case.
Make a pass, conditional pass, or hold recommendation using evidence, decommissioning closure, and residual risk.

standards.rationale: Public reading for learners who want more depth after the lesson.
Practitioner grounding used to validate terminology and process coverage.
Primary process spine for the episode.

episodes.title: Harbour Line Modernization
episodes.subtitle: Rail systems engineering campaign for learners ready for a richer project setting.
episodes.overview: Run a corridor modernization campaign where early boundary, stakeholder, requirements, architecture, integration, verification, and transition decisions compound into commissioning readiness.
episodes.bestFor: Use after EP1 or when you want higher-context project judgment practice.
episodes.prerequisite: Comfort with needs, requirements, interfaces, evidence, and lifecycle gates.
outcomes: Apply systems engineering judgment in a multi-stakeholder rail modernization program.
Manage consequences across seven connected decision chapters.
Use metrics, risk, configuration, and evidence signals to protect commissioning readiness.
Practice Vee-model thinking under integration and assurance pressure.

standards.rationale: Public topic index for deeper systems engineering reading.
